summary: Part 7 Section 7.2 already has the full GPS relativistic derivation (45.9 GR - 7.2 SR = 38.7 μs/day), correct SR direction, Ashby (2003) citation, altitude argument, and visibility geometry. EXP-130 proposes updating the Part 4 dashboard table row 19 to: (a) change +38.3 to +38.7 for consistency, (b) add parenthetical GR/SR breakdown, (c) add Ashby citation, (d) cross-reference Section 7.2. Minimal change — 14 extra words in a table cell.
